visual_analysis.description: A clear plastic water bottle with a blue cap, located behind a red soda can.
A red aluminum can with white lettering, positioned in front of the water bottle.
A white aluminum can with purple and pink graphics, to the right of the other items.

action_plan.explanation: The red soda can is directly in front of and blocking access to the blue water bottle.
Pick the blue water bottle now that the path is clear.
